lead: Definitions on this page are verified against the references below; era-sensitive terms (SCO, Titan/Maelstrom war-state) are flagged in place.

sources.label: newp.io — ED Glossary
sources.what: Primary community glossary — ship nicknames, flight/combat/AX/trade slang, units, signal sources and POIs.

sources.label: Fandom — Acronyms & Slang
sources.what: Canonical community acronym and slang list, cross-checked term by term.

sources.label: Frontier — Odyssey Guide
sources.what: On-foot suits (Maverick, Artemis, Dominator), Apex Interstellar and Frontline Solutions.
